entities.teacher: a female teacher in a blue blouse
entities.boy_glasses: a short boy with round glasses
entities.girl_headband: a girl with a red headband

scenes.title: The Classroom
scenes.background_prompt: A bright elementary school classroom with a whiteboard at the front, three wooden desks arranged in a row, a globe on a side table, and a tall bookshelf filled with colorful books. No people.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A bright elementary school classroom. A female teacher in a blue blouse and gray skirt stands near a whiteboard at the front, gesturing with one hand as if explaining something. Three students sit at wooden desks arranged in a row facing the whiteboard. On the left, a tall girl with long brown braids and a green sweater sits up straight. In the middle, a short boy with round glasses, messy dark hair, and a red polo shirt leans forward over his notebook. On the right, a girl with a red headband, shoulder-length blonde hair, and a purple cardigan rests her chin on her hand. A globe sits on a small table by the window to the left. A tall wooden bookshelf packed with colorful books lines the back wall. The whiteboard has simple math equations written in blue marker.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place teacher near the whiteboard (front), standing and gesturing with one hand. Place girl_braids at the left desk, sitting upright. Place boy_glasses at the middle desk, leaning forward over a notebook. Place girl_headband at the right desk, resting chin on hand.
scenes.scene_description: In this children's picture-book classroom scene, a large whiteboard with a brown wooden frame and stand is positioned on the far left, featuring a white marker, a red marker, a green marker, and a black eraser on its tray. To the right of the whiteboard stands the teacher, a woman with wavy brown hair wearing a light blue long-sleeved shirt, a dark grey skirt, and black heels; she is facing right and pointing her finger toward the students. In the center of the room are three brown wooden desks with attached chairs arranged in a row. At the leftmost desk sits girl_braids, who has long brown hair in two braids and wears a green sweater, a yellow and white striped skirt, and brown boots while looking toward the teacher. At the middle desk, boy_glasses, who has curly brown hair and round glasses, wears a green t-shirt and yellow shorts while writing in an open notebook with a pencil. At the rightmost desk sits girl_headband, who has long brown hair with a red headband and wears a purple sweater, a green skirt, and blue shoes while resting her chin on her hand. Behind the students is a large window with a rounded top showing a sunny outdoor scene with a blue sky, white clouds, green hills, and rounded green trees. To the right of the window is a tall, rounded brown wooden bookshelf filled with colorful books in shades of red, blue, green, and purple. On top of the bookshelf are three potted plants in brown and blue pots. Between the bookshelf and the third desk sits a small wooden table holding a globe on a stand. The room has light orange walls and a floor made of light brown wooden planks that run diagonally across the scene.

sunny day visible through the window
